output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?attendance WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q8619 .
  ?series wdt:P529 wd:Q10080 .
  ?series wdt:P529 wd:Q20350 .
  ?series wdt:P7247 ?attendance .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?attendance WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q8619 .
  ?series wdt:P529 wd:Q10080 .
  ?series wdt:P529 wd:Q20350 .
  ?series wdt:P7247 ?attendance .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1
```
